descriptionShort: Vernon Lakers defeated Richmond Sockeyes 7-6 in BCJHL regular-season game.
descriptionLong: Vernon's Doug Spooner scored four goals as the Lakers edged the Coast Division-leading Richmond Sockeyes 7-6 in a B.C. Junior Hockey League game on Thursday night. Richmond scored twice from Dean Rutledge and once each from Bill Hardy, Paul Rutherford, Jason Phillips, and Rob Clarke, but fell short of the victory.
